task:
Two valid RenderDoc capture files already exist at:

  /home/user/captures/triangle.rdc
  /home/user/captures/draw_call.rdc

Edit the RenderDoc UI configuration at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a JSON document) so that:

1. The key "RecentCaptureFiles" is a JSON array containing exactly these two absolute paths in this order: first "/home/user/captures/triangle.rdc", then "/home/user/captures/draw_call.rdc". No other entries.
2. The key "DefaultCaptureSaveDirectory" is the exact string "/home/user/captures".

Keep the top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker and any other keys intact. Save the file.

verification.description: triangle.rdc is still a valid capture
draw_call.rdc is still a valid capture
